note: Skill catalog describes skills only. Project bindings live in config/projects/<project>.json.

skills.name: ai-context
skills.description: Use when entering, installing, validating, or modifying ai-context, or when routing tasks through project/scene/rule/skill JSON indexes.
skills.trigger: Use when installing ai-context, checking configuration, routing a new task, updating indexes, or advancing G1-G7 task flow.
skills.whenToLoad: Load at the start of ai-context setup or when a task modifies this repository.

skills.name: dhb-local-env
skills.description: Use when running, switching, restoring, or diagnosing local DHB frontend integration environments across cash-mini, dhb-mobile-index, new_mobile_h5, customize-mini-program, or DHB_PACKAGES.
skills.trigger: Run local DHB frontend projects, switch env, restore local env, or diagnose multi-project H5/container integration.
skills.whenToLoad: Load for local run, env switch, restore, or multi-project frontend integration tasks.

skills.name: add-mobile-icon
skills.description: Use when adding SVG mobile image assets to dhbfront-img for DHB frontend packages, including fixed-color icons or theme-color icon variants.
skills.trigger: Add mobile icon, SVG icon, Base64 icon, fixed-color icon, or theme-color icon to dhbfront-img.
skills.whenToLoad: Load when the task creates or updates dhbfront-img mobile SVG assets.

skills.name: dhb-taro-module
skills.description: Use when creating a new Taro business module/package under DHB_PACKAGES.
skills.trigger: Create new DHB_PACKAGES Taro package, business module, demo shell entry, package exports, or package i18n scaffold.
skills.whenToLoad: Load when adding a new Taro business module under DHB_PACKAGES.

skills.name: dhb-api-from-curl
skills.description: Use when the user provides a curl request and wants DHB Taro request code, a mock file, or both.
skills.trigger: Generate request code or mock data from curl for DHB frontend packages.
skills.whenToLoad: Load when converting curl to request code or mock data.

skills.name: dhb-subpackage-release
skills.description: Use when publishing or integrating DHB_PACKAGES subpackage modules into dhbfront-cash-mini, including adding a new subpackage wrapper or updating an existing subpackage version.
skills.trigger: Add subpackage wrapper, update subpackage version, publish DHB_PACKAGES module, or integrate package into dhbfront-cash-mini.
skills.whenToLoad: Load for DHB_PACKAGES to dhbfront-cash-mini publish/update/integration tasks.
